untranslatable_reason: Signal requires manual identification of horizontal support lines through price points at exact lowest levels within sideways patterns. This is a visual/manual pattern recognition task that cannot be expressed using only the allowed quantitative indicators and operators. The core logic—'draw a line through two or more points at the lowest price'—requires geometric pattern detection unavailable in the indicator set. Provided approximation uses ADX and Bollinger Bandwidth to detect ranging conditions, but does not capture the specific support line placement logic.
translation_notes: This is a technical analysis pattern that relies on manual drawing of support lines rather than quantitative thresholds. The entry conditions describe a visual identification process (drawing lines through price points) which cannot be programmatically translated without additional tools for support/resistance detection. ADX < 25 and tight Bollinger Bandwidth approximate ranging conditions mentioned in target_regimes, but the actual support line identification must be done manually or with specialized pattern recognition indicators not in the allowed set.
